title: Update CLAUDE.md Working with Beads section for new introspection commands
description: Update the 'Working with Beads' section of `CLAUDE.md` to list `takt bead history <id>`, `takt bead show <id> --field PATH`, `takt bead list --status STATUS`, `takt bead list --agent AGENT`, and `takt bead list --feature-root <id>` as canonical introspection commands. Remove or de-emphasise any phrasing that implies inline JSON parsing (`cat .takt/beads/... | python3 -c ...`) as the expected pattern. Keep all other CLAUDE.md content unchanged.
acceptance_criteria: CLAUDE.md Working with Beads lists all five new command forms with brief descriptions
No references encourage inline python3 -c JSON parsing as the normal introspection path
All other CLAUDE.md content is unchanged
